scores.notes: The response states 'Both files are written' and provides a detailed walkthrough, but only shows a partial code snippet of _apply_status() — the full src/charm.py and charmcraft.yaml are never displayed in the response text. Uses the legacy install+config_changed pattern with direct self.unit.status assignment rather than the modern collect_unit_status approach (gold standard notes both are acceptable, but the description suggests older bases format for charmcraft.yaml instead of platforms). All APIs mentioned (ops.WaitingStatus, ops.ActiveStatus, self.unit.status, install/config_changed events) are real and correct — no hallucinations.
